response: Data collection begins with identifying the sources where data will be gathered and ensuring data accuracy. Data entry requires careful attention to data formatting and data validation. Data analysis involves organizing data sets and interpreting data trends. Data interpretation depends on comparing data patterns and data reliability. Data storage ensures data security and data accessibility. Data sharing involves transmitting data securely and maintaining data integrity. Data monitoring tracks data changes and ensures data consistency. Data evaluation concludes the study by assessing data outcomes and data relevance.
